extension.news: v. 1.0.9 "Cloud Nine" - 2026-04-20 - **10 New Sites**: ArchiveBate, CamCaps, Chaturbate, HentaiDude, HentaiOcean, Ikisoda, JAVHDPorn, Perverzija, PMVHaven (by user request), XOpenload. - **Improved and Fixed**: AVJoy, WatchPorn. - **ArchiveBate**: Right-click filters (Gender, Sort), local thumbnail proxy-cache for CDN bypass, Livewire routing fixes. - **AVJoy**: Page/session/stream caching, curl.exe/curl_cffi fetch paths, pre-resolving for visible videos, seek-aware local curl proxy for slow CDN streams. - **CamCaps and Chaturbate**: Search, categories, Sort By, pagination, and hardened playback (Lulu HLS proxy, Clicknplay fast-start, Chaturbate room proxy). - **Hentai/JAV**: HentaiDude (subtitles, pagination, dashboard fallback), HentaiOcean (API/RSS, direct MP4), Ikisoda (KVS direct MP4), JAVHDPorn (Cloudflare-aware, StreamTape/HugStream resolver). - **PMVHaven and Perverzija**: API pagination, search, categories, Sort By; Perverzija adds Cloudflare-hardened listings and XtremeStream HLS. - **XOpenload**: Full-length movie support with multi-hoster resolver (MixDrop, StreamTape, DoodStream, Voe). - **WatchPorn**: Removed fragile local proxy path, fixed seek stability via direct header-based playback. - **Removed**: MaturePorn.Tube (404 only). - **Core Engine**: Updated vendored cloudscraper stack, added small resolver ports, kept networking pure-Python for Android/Fire TV. - **10th Anniversary Year**: 1.0.9 continues the next expansion wave of AdultHideout's anniversary year.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.
